goals.title: Add tests-first coverage for blockquote Live Preview: line-level rang...
goals.objective: Add tests-first coverage for blockquote Live Preview: line-level ranges, blank `>`/`> ` lines, indentation boundaries, code/table false positives, line.from/line.to activation boundaries, mounted DOM reveal/restore, and coexistence with inline renderers.
goals.evidence: Added tests/editor-live-preview-blocks.test.ts covering line-level blockquote ranges, blank blockquote lines, indentation/code/table false positives, line.from/line.to activation boundaries, mounted DOM reveal/restore, and inline renderer coexistence. Pre-implementation run pnpm test -- tests/editor-live-preview-blocks.test.ts failed 6/6 as expected because blockquote renderer is not implemented yet.

goals.title: Add internal line-decoration support in @zorid/editor Live Preview an...
goals.objective: Add internal line-decoration support in @zorid/editor Live Preview and implement a private blockquote line renderer included in defaultLivePreviewRenderers.
goals.evidence: Added internal LivePreviewDecorationKind 'line' mapped to CodeMirror Decoration.line at line start. Implemented private blockquote renderer in packages/editor/src/live-preview/renderers.ts, included in defaultLivePreviewRenderers without a new package-root named export. Blockquote renderer emits one z-live-preview-blockquote-line range per source line, uses activationFrom/activationTo per line, and skips suppressed code ranges. Verified pnpm test -- tests/editor-live-preview-blocks.test.ts and pnpm --filter @zorid/editor run typecheck.

goals.title: Add scoped desktop styling for the blockquote line preview class and...
goals.objective: Add scoped desktop styling for the blockquote line preview class and update style-scope tests.
goals.evidence: Added scoped .markdown-editor .z-live-preview-blockquote-line desktop styling using existing tokens/color-mix and updated tests/desktop-live-preview-styles.test.ts to include the blockquote class plus negative checks for markdown-preview/global blockquote styling. Verified pnpm test -- tests/desktop-live-preview-styles.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-blocks.test.ts.
